articles.title: Why the TCS Nashik case has sparked outrage | Pulse Maharashtra
articles.description: A major police investigation is underway into allegations involving employees at Tata Consultancy Services’ Nashik BPO facility. Multiple FIRs have been registered accusing certain staff members of sexual harassment, coercion, and attempts at religious conversion. As arrests are made and an SIT probes the claims, the case has triggered outrage and raised wider questions about workplace safety, consent, religious freedom, and due process. TCS has suspended the accused employees and launched an internal inquiry as the investigation continues.

topStories.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars, days after Trump spat
topStories.description: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

topStories.title: Who is Roelf Meyer, South Africa’s new ambassador to the US?
topStories.description: So who is Meyer and will his appointment help improve ties between the two countries?

topStories.title: Ceasefire in Lebanon ‘as important’ as in Iran, says Ghalibaf
topStories.description: Tehran 'striving' to compel US and Israel to establish permanent ceasefire in all conflict zones, Iranian speaker says.

topStories.title: TCS Nashik case reaches Supreme Court: Plea filed over ‘organised’ religious conversion, sexual harassment
topStories.description: A plea has been filed before the top court on Thursday.

topStories.title: How is a constitution amendment Bill passed?
topStories.description: A Constitutional Amendment Bill must secure two-thirds of majority votes in both Houses, and get ratified by at least 50% State legislatures, if it affects the federal structure, before receiving an assent from President

topStories.title: Brazil's former spy chief released from ICE detention
topStories.description: Bolsonaro ally Alexandre Ramagem was stopped by immigration agents in Orlando, Florida on Monday.

topStories.title: Congress’s Gaurav Gogoi accuses govt of using women quota for political gains
topStories.description: Congress lawmaker Gaurav Gogoi said that the government intended to weaponise delimitation for political gain, as was done in Assam and Jammu and Kashmir

topStories.title: ‘Iran has to come’ to the US for the World Cup, FIFA’s Infantino says
topStories.description: FIFA chief reasserts his views on Iran's participation, saying 'the players want to play' in the tournament.

topStories.description: PM Modi on women quota: “If you oppose me, I will get the political benefit, but if you support us, no one will benefit,” he said.

dailyNews.title: In the House, Republican Plans Go Awry Amid Party Divides
dailyNews.description: Fresh off a two-week break, lawmakers returned to turmoil in the House, where legislation to reopen the Department of Homeland Security is stalled and the G.O.P. is struggling to keep its agenda on track.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Quest for More Sway Over Fed Faces Fresh Hurdles
dailyNews.description: Jerome H. Powell’s term as chair of the Federal Reserve ends on May 15, but it appears increasingly likely that he will stay on in some capacity at the central bank after that.

dailyNews.title: Labor Department Investigates Texts Sent Among Staff, Secretary and Her Family
dailyNews.description: Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer asked staff members to bring wine to her hotel room, and to keep in touch with her husband and father.

dailyNews.title: Yale Report Finds Colleges Deserve Blame for Higher Education’s Problems
dailyNews.description: A 10-member committee offered a brutal assessment of academia’s role in creating the forces challenging American colleges and universities.

dailyNews.title: China’s G.D.P. Stronger Than Expected, Led by Infrastructure Spending
dailyNews.description: A steep slide in housing prices has left consumers less prosperous and less willing to spend, but the government is pouring money into new rail lines and other projects.

dailyNews.title: Xi Alludes to Trump’s Policies to Make a Case for Closer Ties to Vietnam
dailyNews.description: China used a visit by the Vietnamese leader to show a deepening of security ties that analysts say far outpaces U.S. defense ties in the region.

dailyNews.title: Inside the Storage Units of Six New Yorkers
dailyNews.description: In a city of notoriously small apartments, New Yorkers keep their meaningful mementos and quirky collections elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Ahead of 2028, Vance Collects Cash, Chits and Contacts
dailyNews.description: The vice president is also the finance chair of the Republican National Committee, allowing him to court donors who could prove helpful should he run for president.

dailyNews.title: Talarico Leads a Democratic Cash Surge: 7 Takeaways From 2026 Filings
dailyNews.description: Democrats in key Senate races out-raised their Republican rivals, but super PACs on the right are poised to play a powerful role in the midterms, new campaign finance filings showed.

dailyNews.title: Who’s Winning the Cash Race in 9 Top Senate Contests?
dailyNews.description: Money from Democratic donors has flowed into the coffers of the party’s top Senate candidates — especially its nominee in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ‘Triumphal Arch’ Draws Backlash, Even From an Expert Who Proposed It
dailyNews.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

dailyNews.title: Orban’s Defeat Punctures Europe’s Far Right, but Also Offers It a Road Map
dailyNews.description: Corruption and economic mismanagement brought down Hungary’s authoritarian leader. Will his political disciples avoid those pitfalls?

topStories.title: Trump pushed Iran to the brink — but did we win anything that lasts?
topStories.description: Islamabad talks ended without a deal after 21 hours. Robert Maginnis examines why Iran's survival means the strategic competition is far from over.

topStories.title: Kamala Harris blames president for high gas prices: 'This is a direct result of Donald Trump's war of choice'
topStories.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris says high fuel prices across America are directly due to President Donald Trump's war against Iran.

topStories.title: Why Jerome Powell — not Trump — will decide when the Fed chief steps down
topStories.description: President Trump would love to be finally rid of Fed Chair Jerome Powell. But firing him would kick up a legal firestorm and roil financial markets, experts said.

topStories.title: Diplomacy to end Iran war ramps up as Trump touts Israel-Lebanon talks
topStories.description: With the Iran war frozen by a ceasefire but oil still not moving through the Strait of Hormuz, there are burgeoning efforts to build a diplomatic off-ramp.

topStories.title: House set to break with Trump, vote against ending deportation protections for Haitians
topStories.description: All House Democrats and four Republicans forced a vote on a measure to stop the Trump administration from ending temporary deportation protections for more than 300,000 people from Haiti.

dailyNews.title: Diplomacy to end Iran war ramps up as Trump touts Israel-Lebanon talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war frozen by a ceasefire but oil still not moving through the Strait of Hormuz, there are burgeoning efforts to build a diplomatic off-ramp.

dailyNews.title: House set to break with Trump, vote against ending deportation protections for Haitians
dailyNews.description: All House Democrats and four Republicans forced a vote on a measure to stop the Trump administration from ending temporary deportation protections for more than 300,000 people from Haiti.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin set to launch tariff refund portal. Here's what to know.
dailyNews.description: A federal agency will open a portal on April 20 that lets businesses apply for a refund for Trump tariffs struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: As U.S. birth rate falls, Trump officials downplay contraception in Title X program
dailyNews.description: According to new CDC data, there were 3.6 million U.S. births in 2025, a 1% decline from 2024 and down 23% since 2007. The Trump administration has said it wants to reverse this trend.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: 3 killed in latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, Pentagon says
dailyNews.description: President Trump has said the U.S. is in "armed conflict" with cartels in Latin America and has justified the attacks as a necessary escalation to stem the flow of drugs into the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Gabbard sends criminal referrals to DOJ for 2 officials linked to Trump impeachment
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has sent criminal referrals to the Justice Department related to a government watchdog and a whistleblower whose complaint helped trigger President Trump's first impeachment.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks after first high-level meeting in decades
dailyNews.description: The U.S. president said he was "trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon."

dailyNews.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is preparing banks to collect citizenship data
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration expects banks to comply in collecting citizenship information from customers.

dailyNews.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
dailyNews.description: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.

dailyNews.title: Thom Tillis opens up on which Cabinet secretaries are giving Trump bad advice
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) sits down exclusively with NBC News' Julie Tsirkin to discuss how he views President Trump’s strategy on Iran, the midterms and his choice to retire from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of drugs despite Trump deals, report finds
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his deals with drugmakers would bring down prescription drug prices in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: White House and DOJ separation changes under Trump
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Laura Jarrett stops by "Here's the Scoop" to discuss her interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and how he sees the future of the Justice Department.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Hegseth urges Iran's new leaders to 'choose wisely'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
